NotFound.description: The greenhouse, profile, or assignment does not exist.

ValidationFailed.description: A value is out of range or violates a setpoint/threshold invariant; the body names the violated bound.

ServiceUnavailable.description: (2a) The greenhouse exists, but its controller could not be reached (or did not return its setpoints) for the live relay. The platform does not own setpoints in 2a, so rather than serve a stale guess it reports the controller as unavailable. Retry once the controller reconnects.

Unauthorized.description: (2b) Missing or invalid bearer token. In 2a the API is unauthenticated on the trusted Docker network and this response does not occur (RFC-009).

Forbidden.description: (2b) Authenticated but lacking the operator role required for this write (platform security §4).

BadRequest.description: The request is malformed or references an inadmissible value — e.g. (3) a model not in the active provider's available_models allowlist (optimizer interfaces).

Conflict.description: (3) The requested action conflicts with current optimizer state — the optimizer is disabled (read-only), or the greenhouse already has a cycle in flight (optimizer interfaces).
